Bash(/c/Users/kimsi/AppData/Local/Microsoft/WindowsApps/python3 << 'PYEND'
import openpyxl
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter

# File 1: 콘텐츠 구성\(안\)_v01.xlsx
file1 = r"C:\\Users\\kimsi\\OneDrive\\문서\\카카오톡 받은 파일\\콘텐츠 구성\(안\)_v01.xlsx"
wb1 = openpyxl.load_workbook\(file1, data_only=True\)

print\("="*100\)
print\("FILE 1: 콘텐츠 구성\(안\)_v01.xlsx"\)
print\("="*100\)
print\(f"\\nSheet names: {wb1.sheetnames}"\)

# Find the sheet with work progress data
for sheet_idx, sheet_name in enumerate\(wb1.sheetnames\):
    ws = wb1[sheet_name]
    print\(f"\\n\\nSHEET {sheet_idx + 1}: {repr\(sheet_name\)}"\)
    print\(f"Dimensions: {ws.dimensions}, Max row: {ws.max_row}, Max col: {ws.max_column}"\)
    
    # Print cell references for first 30 rows with column letters
    print\(f"\\nCell-by-cell data \(showing first 30 rows\):"\)
    for row_num in range\(1, min\(31, ws.max_row + 1\)\):
        cells = []
        for col_num in range\(1, ws.max_column + 1\):
            cell = ws.cell\(row_num, col_num\)
            col_letter = get_column_letter\(col_num\)
            value = cell.value
            if value is not None:
                cells.append\(f"{col_letter}{row_num}:{repr\(value\)}"\)
        if cells:
            print\(f"  Row {row_num}: {' | '.join\(cells\)}"\)

PYEND)
